# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect agent/instruction/prompt behavior)
- [ ] New agent, instruction, or prompt
- [ ] Improvement to existing configuration
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Layer(s) Affected

- [ ] GitHub Copilot (`.github/`)
- [ ] Claude Code (`.claude/`)
- [ ] Shared docs / root files

## Checklist

- [ ] Both layers updated where the change applies to both (Copilot + Claude Code)
- [ ] Content is generic — no project-specific rules baked in
- [ ] Frontend-specific content respects the `FRONTEND` flag convention
- [ ] File naming, frontmatter, and formatting match neighboring files
- [ ] Docs in `docs/` updated if the change affects the setup guides
